subject: [PATCH 2/2] mm/vmpressure: split v1 userspace eventfd code into vmpressure-v1.c

2026-06-06.patch_summary: This patch splits the v1 userspace eventfd code from mm/vmpressure.c into a new file, mm/vmpressure-v1.c. The new file is only built when CONFIG_MEMCG_V1 is enabled and contains the cgroup v1 specific code. The shared and v2 in-kernel code remains in mm/vmpressure.c. This change reduces memory usage by removing unnecessary fields from struct vmpressure and its derivatives, resulting in a 88-byte reduction for each instance of these structures.
